JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, PATTY DOWLING - REPORTER: C/C FOR SETT. CONF, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIROIN, MANUEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34-6TH STREET, #217, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT EVICTION STAYED UNTIL 5PM 25-OCT-95; RENT AND DAMAGES OF $944.00 BUT IF DEFT. VACATES PREMISES AS AGREED, NO MONEY SHALL BE DUE AND PLTF. SHALL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT; (SEE FILE FOR MORE DETAILS).
